Document:
# BALENA-CLASS PARTY SHUTTLE
[color=#a4885c]Ship Size:[/color] Medium
[color=#a4885c]Recommended Crew:[/color] 2+
[color=#a4885c]Power Gen Type:[/color] Uranium
"A comfortably sized super-yacht guaranteed to impress your friends and embarrass your rivals."
"Absolutely overflowing with all kinds of alcohol and the supplies required to make all manner of fried concessions to keep the party going."
"Contains a pool stocked with all of the summer necessities."
"Has a small concession stand area with all of the necessary implements to supply your elite clientele with au d'oeuvres."
"Constructed with a full-service bar in the primary social area as well as a self-serve swim-up refreshment station poolside."
[italic]Prestige Travel: Where flamboyance meets affluence.[/italic]

# Hiring crew
[textlink="Hiring" link="Hiring"/]
As a Captain of a Nanotrasen vessel, you have the authority to hire, fire, demote, or promote crew members at will.
